name: Home Plate Acquisition Corporation Unit
summary: Home Plate Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The unit consists of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. The company is focused on the consumer, retail, and technology industries and is headquartered in New York, NY.
